title: tephrosia longifolia
intro: Tephrosia longifolia, also known as Katikati or Long-leaf Tephrosia, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia, particularly in India, China, and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Tephrosia longifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin problems, as well as its potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Tephrosia longifolia is commonly used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
